description: Upload Specifications that will be pending review

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: The ID of the project to upload to

401.description: Company or project is not valid, user is not an active contact, company does not have an ERP connection

specification_set_id.description: The ID of the specification set to upload to

specification_section_id.description:
The ID of a Specification Section to apply to all pages in the attached file.
If present, the upload will not require review unless the Specification Section is deleted during processing.

default_revision.description: A default revision designation to be applied to Specification Section Revisions generated from this upload

files.description:
One or more files in PDF format to include in the upload (limited to one if specification_section_id is set).
*To upload drawings you must upload the entire payload as `multipart/form-data` content...

upload_uuids.description:
Array of uploaded files UUIDs.
*Required only if files is empty

issued_date.description: The date when the specifications were issued by the design team

received_date.description: The date when the specifications were received by the GC

ignore_number.description: Numbers that resemble a spec section number can make it difficult to accurately split up and auto-label the spec sections. This field contains a number flagged to be ignored by the OCR technology a...

spec_format.description: Specification format to apply to the upload.
